titleStmt.title: SII 5.302: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 302. (A.R. No. 14 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svasti śrī . pūviṉkiḻatti mevi viṟṟiruppa metiṉimātu nitiyiṟ puṇara vayappormaṭantai jayappuyat tiruppa mākkalaimaṭantai vākkiṉil viḷaṅ
kat ticai yirunāṉku micai nilā veṟippa maṟaineṟi vaḷara maṉuneṟi tikaḻa vaṟaneṟiccamaiyaṅka(ḷ) ḷāṟun taḻaippa kāṉaveṅkaiyai villuṭaṉ ṟurantu
mi(ṉ)ṉaṅ kaṉakācalattu viṟṟiruppa Eṇkiri cūḻnta Eḻukaṭal leḻupoḻil veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟa Iruṅkol naṭappa koṭuṅkali naṭuṅki neṭumpilat
(t) toḷippa villavar cempiyar virāṭar marāṭar pallavar tiṟaiyuṭaṉ muṟaimuṟai paṇiya Irunemiyaḷavu morunemi yoṅkaiṉṉamutākiya Iyalicai
nāṭakam maṉṉi vaḷara maṇimuṭi cūṭi viḷaṅki kati(r)roḷi virasiṁhāsa nattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tri (ri)puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkula
cekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟavati ṉāḷ Āyirattiraṇṭiṉāl maturaiyutaiyavaḷanāṭṭu māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaikkoyil paḷḷiyaṟai yuḷḷālaip paḷḷi
ppiṭaṅ kāliṅkarācaṉi leḻuntaruḷiyiruntu teṉkallakanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār śrīmulasthā namuṭaiyārkoyi[l śrī]kāriyañ ceyvāṉum tevar(kaṉ)
kaṉmiyum(ñ) ceyyattiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Ittevaṟku tiruccāntu cāttiyaruḷa veṇṭuvaṉavukku paṭiyaraṇipakavatiyaṉ kaṇṭiyatevaṉ
pākaṉūrkkūṟṟattu coḻakulāntakaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu kaārāṇmaiyāka vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilamuṭpaṭa paḻampāṭakappaṭi Añcumākkāṇi ya
raikkāṇi nila muṉṟavati ṉetir nālāmāṇṭu mutal Antarāyamu viṉiyokamuṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ
kāliṅkarāyaṉ namakku coṉṉamaiyil Ittevarkkut tiruccāntu cāttiyaruḷa veṇṭuvaṉavukku paṭiyaraṇipakavatiyaṉ kaṇṭiyatevaṉ
kārāṇmaiyāka Ivvūril vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam Uḷppaṭa paḻampāṭakappaṭi Añcumākkāṇi Araikkāṇi nilam muṉṟāvati
ṇṭu mutal Antarāya viṉiyokam Uḷppaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyi(l)lār Uḷvariyum nam Olaiyum taraccoṉṉom Ippaṭi
koṇṭu tiruccāntu cāttiyaruḷappaṇṇukaveṉṟu cantirātittaval celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Eṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷi
ṉār Ivai puṟapaṟaḷaināṭṭu puttū(r)ruṭaiyāṉ poṉṉaṉ cūriyateva(ṉ)ṉāṉa cetarayappallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu Antarāyamum vi
Uḷpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku vuḷvari teṉkallakanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār śrīmulasthā namuṭaiyārkku tiruccāntu cāttiyaruḷa veṇṭuvaṉa
vatiṉ Etir muvāmāṇṭu mutal Antarāya viṉiyoka(m) muḷpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy yiṟuppatāka pākaṉūrkūṟṟattu coḻakulāntakacca
di maṅkalattu paṭiyaraṇipakavatiyāṉa kaṇṭiyatevaṉ koṇṭiṭṭa nilam Uḷpaṭa paḻampāṭakappaṭi nilam Añcumākkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum muṉṟāvatiṉ E
yāṇṭu mutal Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam puṟampaṟaḷaināṭṭu nirmaṭaiyū(r)ruṭaiyāṉ Upakaripuka(ḻ)ḻāparaṇaṉāṉa teṉṉavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Āntavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai na rāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai vā(ṇ)ṇarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai vayirātarācaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai Īḻattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai
tarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai kumaṇarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . tribhu vaṉaccakkaravatti koṉerinmeykoṇṭāṉ teṉkallakanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār śrīmulasthā namuṭaiyā
ṟ śrīkāriyañ ceyivāṉukkum tevakaṉmikaḷukkum Iṉṉāyanār tiruccāntu cāttiyaruḷa veṇṭuva kaṇṭiyatevaṉ
ttu coḻakulāntakaccatu rvedi maṅkalattu kuṭutta nilam Uḷpaṭa paḻampāṭakappaṭi Aiñcumākkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum
ṉṟāvati ṉetir muvāmāṇṭu mutal kaṭamai Antarāya viṉiyoka t tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ
namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ittevaṟku tiruccāntu cāt vukku paṭiyaraṇipakavatiyāṉa kaṇṭiyatevaṉ Ivvūril kārāṇmai vilaikoṇṭa nila
m muṭpaṭa paḻampāṭakappaṭi Aiñcumākkāṇi Araikkāṇi vati(ṉ)ṉetir muvāmāṇṭu mutal kaṭamai Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum Uḷpaṭa te
vatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyi(l)lār Uḷvariyum naṅ taraccoṉṉom . Ippaṭi kaikkoṇṭu Ittevaṟku tiruccāntu cāttiyaruḷu
vatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittukkoḷka Eṉṟu perumaṇalūr mantiri Ātittatevaṉ Eḻuttu . yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatiṉ nāḷ
caṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai pallavarācaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.302 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
